name: Hilti Nuron TE 6-22 SDS-Plus Rotary Hammer
description: Versatile SDS-Plus cordless rotary hammer with wide drilling range, chipping function, quick-change chuck, and Active Vibration Reduction (AVR). The go-to hammer for overhead and concrete work.

name: Hilti Nuron TE 4-22 SDS-Plus Rotary Hammer
description: Compact and lightweight SDS-Plus rotary hammer for overhead drilling and anchoring in concrete and masonry. Ideal for MEP trades.

name: Hilti Nuron TE 30-22 SDS-Plus Rotary Hammer
description: The most powerful and versatile SDS-Plus cordless rotary hammer in the Nuron lineup. Corded-tool performance without the cord for heavy-duty drilling and chipping.

name: Hilti Nuron TE 50-22 SDS-Max Rotary Hammer
description: Full-size SDS-Max cordless rotary hammer with Active Vibration Reduction. Replaces corded combihammers for drilling and light chipping in concrete.

name: Hilti Nuron TE 500-22 Cordless Breaker
description: High-performance cordless breaker delivering 1.8 tons of concrete removal per battery charge. Industry-leading work-per-charge for demolition applications.

name: Hilti Nuron SF 6H-22 Hammer Drill/Driver
description: High-performance cordless hammer drill/driver for drilling in wood, metal, and masonry. Power-class tool with brushless motor and electronic clutch.

name: Hilti Nuron SID 6-22 Impact Driver
description: Power-class cordless impact driver with high-speed brushless motor for driving and fastening. Compact design for tight jobsite spaces.

name: Hilti Nuron SIW 6-22 1/2" Impact Wrench
description: Mid-torque cordless 1/2-inch impact wrench for automotive, mechanical, and structural applications. Compact and powerful.

name: Hilti Nuron SIW 8-22 1/2" High-Torque Impact Wrench
description: Ultimate-class, high-torque cordless impact wrench with 1/2" friction ring anvil for structural bolting and heavy anchor installation.

name: Hilti Nuron SIW 10-22 3/4" High-Torque Impact Wrench
description: Maximum power 3/4-inch cordless impact wrench for heavy structural steel and infrastructure applications.

name: Hilti Nuron AG 6D-22 6" Cordless Angle Grinder
description: High-performance 6-inch cordless angle grinder with SensTech control and brushless motor. ATC prevents dangerous kickback.

name: Hilti Nuron AG 4D-22 5" Cordless Angle Grinder
description: Compact 5-inch cordless angle grinder with safety features. Perfect for cutting and grinding metal, concrete, and masonry.

name: Hilti Nuron SCW 22 Cordless Circular Saw
description: Cordless 6-1/2 inch circular saw for cutting wood, wood composites, and metal studs on the jobsite.

name: Hilti Nuron SCT 60-22 Cordless Table Saw
description: Jobsite cordless table saw with 10-inch blade and rack-and-pinion fence for precise rip cuts. Portable with optional rolling stand.

name: Hilti Nuron SR 6-22 Cordless Reciprocating Saw
description: Cordless reciprocating saw for demolition, pipe cutting, and metal cutting. Orbital action for fast cuts in wood.

name: Hilti Nuron SD 5000-22 Cordless Drywall Screwdriver
description: High-speed cordless drywall screwdriver for interior finishing. 5000 RPM brushless motor for fast screw driving.

name: Hilti DX 5 MX Fully Automatic Powder-Actuated Tool
description: Fully automatic powder-actuated fastening tool for concrete and steel. Integrated piston return eliminates jamming. Industry standard for structural fastening.

name: Hilti Nuron SL 6-22 Cordless LED Work Light
description: High-output cordless LED work light powered by Nuron batteries. Adjustable head for directing light where needed.

name: Hilti Nuron SFC 22 Compact Drill/Driver
description: Compact cordless drill/driver for general drilling and driving applications in wood, metal, and plastic.

name: Hilti Nuron SIW 4AT-22 1/2" Impact Wrench
description: Compact 1/2-inch cordless impact wrench with Active Torque Control. Ideal for mechanical and automotive applications.

name: Festool TSC 55 KEB Cordless Track Saw
description: The tool that invented track-guided sawing. Cordless plunge-cut saw with 1.6mm thin kerf blade for splinter-free cuts. Runs on one or two 18V batteries. Pairs with Festool guide rails.

name: Festool TS 55 REBQ-Plus Track Saw (Corded)
description: The gold standard of track saws. Corded plunge-cut saw with MMC electronics for constant speed under load. Delivers glue-line quality cuts.

name: Festool ETSC 125 Cordless Random Orbit Sander
description: Cordless 5-inch random orbit sander with same power as corded version. Hybrid operation: use cordless or plug in for unlimited runtime. Integrated dust extraction.

name: Festool DTSC 400 Cordless Delta Sander
description: Cordless delta sander for corners, edges, and detail work. LED light ring for optimal visibility. Integrated dust extraction for clean operation.
features: Delta pad for corners and edges

name: Festool ROTEX RO 150 FEQ Dual-Mode Sander
description: Three sanders in one: gear-driven eccentric, random orbit, and polisher. Aggressive stock removal and fine finishing in one tool. The most versatile sander ever made.

name: Festool ETS 150/3 EQ Random Orbit Sander
description: 6-inch random orbit sander with ultra-smooth operation. 3mm stroke for efficient stock removal while maintaining fine finish quality.

name: Festool OF 1010 REBQ-Plus Router
description: Precision plunge router with LED light ring and double-sided column clamp for extreme rigidity. Micro-adjustable depth stop for repeatable accuracy.

name: Festool OF 1400 EQ Router
description: Mid-size plunge router with 1400W motor and smooth plunge action. Accepts 1/2" shank bits for larger profiles. The workhorse router for serious woodworkers.

name: Festool DOMINO DF 500 Q Joining Machine
description: Revolutionary loose-tenon joining system that creates perfect mortise-and-tenon joints in seconds. Combines the strength of traditional joinery with modern speed.

name: Festool DOMINO DFC 500 Cordless Joining Machine
description: The iconic DOMINO joiner goes cordless. 18V battery power with smart app features for even more flexibility on the jobsite and in the shop.

name: Festool CARVEX PSBC 420 Cordless Jigsaw
description: Cordless barrel-grip jigsaw with patented triple-blade guide for the most precise jigsaw cuts possible. Splinter-free cutting in all materials.

name: Festool T 18 HPC 4.0 I-Plus Cordless Drill/Driver
description: Premium cordless drill/driver with CENTROTEC chuck system for instant bit changes. EC-TEC brushless motor. Includes 2 batteries and Systainer.

name: Festool TID 18 HPC 4.0 I-Plus Cordless Impact Driver
description: Compact cordless impact driver with extremely robust hammer mechanism. Perfect for cabinetry, decking, and general construction fastening.

name: Festool CXS 18 Compact Cordless Drill/Driver
description: Ultra-compact cordless drill for precision work. 3/8" keyless chuck ideal for hinge boring, pilot holes, and fine woodworking applications.

name: Festool CT MIDI I Dust Extractor
description: Mid-size dust extractor that pairs with all Festool sanders and saws. Auto-start feature turns on extractor when tool starts. Systainer-compatible design.

name: Festool CTC MIDI Cordless Dust Extractor
description: Fully cordless dust extractor using dual 18V batteries for 36V turbine power. Mobile dust extraction for jobsite work without power outlets.

name: Festool KAPEX KS 120 REB Sliding Compound Miter Saw
description: The pinnacle of miter saw design. Dual-sliding rail system eliminates wall clearance issues. Unmatched precision with dual laser and LED light.

name: Festool HLC 82 Cordless Planer
description: Cordless hand planer for precise fitting work. Combines innovative technology with high performance for efficient and precise planing in the woodworking trade.

name: Festool OFKC 500 Cordless Edge Router
description: Cordless edge router for rounding, chamfering, and flush routing. Greater flexibility and maneuverability without a cord.

name: Festool ETSC 2 125 Cordless Sander with LED
description: First cordless random orbit sander with integrated LED lighting. Enhanced visibility and mobility without sacrificing power or precision.

name: Dremel 8250 12V Cordless Brushless Rotary Tool
description: Flagship 12V cordless rotary tool with brushless motor, lifetime warranty, and 20% more power than the 4300. Compatible with all Dremel accessories.

name: Dremel 8240 12V Cordless Rotary Tool
description: Versatile 12V cordless rotary tool with variable speed and full accessory compatibility. Great balance of power and price for cordless convenience.

name: Dremel 8150 8V Compact Cordless Rotary Tool
description: Most powerful and precise compact cordless rotary tool Dremel has ever made. USB-C charging for ultimate convenience. Brushless motor in a portable package.

name: Dremel 4300 Corded Rotary Tool
description: Highest performance corded rotary tool. 1.8 amp motor, universal 3-jaw chuck fits all Dremel accessories and competing brands. Pivot light.

name: Dremel 3000 Corded Rotary Tool
description: The most popular rotary tool ever made. Reliable, powerful, and affordable. EZ Twist nose cap for fast accessory changes.

name: Dremel Lite 7760 Cordless Rotary Tool
description: Ultra-lightweight 4V cordless rotary tool for crafting, light engraving, and detail work. Only 9.6 oz. Smooth motor at all speeds.

name: Dremel Multi-Max MM50 Oscillating Tool
description: Powerful 5.0 amp oscillating multi-tool for sanding, cutting, scraping, and grout removal. Quick-change accessory system.

name: Dremel Ultra-Saw US40 Compact Circular Saw
description: Compact 4-inch circular saw for flush cutting, metal cutting, and tile cutting. One tool replaces rotary tools for heavy cutting tasks.

name: Dremel Saw-Max SM20 Compact Saw
description: Handheld mini circular saw for cutting wood, plastic, tile, and metal. Variable speed for different materials. More capable than a rotary tool for cutting tasks.

name: Dremel Stylo+ 2050 Corded Rotary Tool
description: Pen-style precision rotary tool for crafting, engraving, polishing, and detail work. Ergonomic slim barrel design.

name: Dremel VersaFlame 2200 Butane Torch
description: Multi-function self-lighting butane torch for soldering, heat shrink tubing, hot cutting, pyrography, and paint removal.

name: Klein Tools 9" High-Leverage Side-Cutting Pliers
description: The industry-standard lineman's pliers. High-leverage design for 46% more cutting power. Induction-hardened cutting knives for long life. Made in USA.

name: Klein Tools 8" Long Nose Side-Cutting Pliers
description: Long nose pliers with side cutter for bending, shaping, and cutting wire. Essential for every electrician's tool pouch. Made in USA.

name: Klein Tools Klein-Kurve Wire Stripper/Cutter
description: Precision wire stripper and cutter with curved handles for comfortable all-day use. Strips solid and stranded copper wire cleanly without nicking.

name: Klein Tools Wire Stripper/Cutter Self-Adjusting
description: Self-adjusting wire stripper automatically sizes to wire gauge. No dial or adjustment needed. Strips, cuts, and loops wire in one tool.

name: Klein Tools CL800 Digital Clamp Meter AC/DC TRMS
description: Auto-ranging AC/DC TRMS clamp meter with low impedance (LoZ) mode. Built-in non-contact voltage tester. Measures current, voltage, resistance, continuity, frequency, and temperature.

name: Klein Tools MM600 Digital Multimeter
description: Auto-ranging TRMS digital multimeter measuring AC/DC voltage, current, resistance, continuity, frequency, capacitance, and temperature. HVAC and electrical rated.

name: Klein Tools NCVT-3P Dual Range Voltage Tester
description: Dual-range non-contact voltage tester with built-in flashlight. Low and high sensitivity ranges for versatile voltage detection. Every electrician needs one.

name: Klein Tools 65-Foot Steel Fish Tape
description: 65-foot spring-steel fish tape with permanent laser-etched depth markings every foot. Ideal for pulling wire through walls and conduit.

name: Klein Tools BAT20CD1 Battery-Operated Compact Impact Driver Kit
description: Compact battery-operated impact driver designed for electricians. Drives fasteners in tight electrical panel locations. Includes battery and charger.

name: Klein Tools BAT20CW1 Battery-Operated Compact Impact Wrench Kit
description: Compact 1/2-inch battery-operated impact wrench designed for electricians. Ideal for lag bolts, conduit couplings, and panel hardware.

name: Klein Tools BAT20LW1 90-Degree Impact Wrench Kit
description: 90-degree angle impact wrench for working in tight spaces like electrical panels, transformers, and mechanical rooms. Battery and charger included.

name: Klein Tools BAT20GD1 Battery-Operated Cable Cutter
description: Battery-operated EHS closed-jaw cutter for cutting extra-high-strength guy wire, ACSR, and hardened cable. Eliminates hand fatigue from manual cutting.

name: Klein Tools BAT207T14H Battery-Operated Crimper
description: Battery-operated 7-ton hydraulic crimper for crimping copper and aluminum connectors. Eliminates hand fatigue on large crimping jobs.

name: Klein Tools Multi-Bit Screwdriver/Nut Driver 11-in-1
description: 11-in-1 screwdriver and nut driver with 8 screwdriver tips plus 3 nut driver sizes. Replaces a full screwdriver set in one tool. Cushion grip.

name: Klein Tools Tradesman Pro Tool Bag Backpack
description: 39-pocket tool backpack designed for electricians. Molded hard bottom protects tools and keeps bag upright. Laptop sleeve for service calls.

name: Knipex Cobra Water Pump Pliers 10"
description: The pliers that made adjustable pliers obsolete. Push-button adjustment locks on the workpiece instantly. Self-locking on pipes and nuts. German-made precision.

name: Knipex Cobra Water Pump Pliers 12"
description: 12-inch Cobra for larger pipes and fittings. Same push-button adjustment and self-locking mechanism. Essential for plumbing work.

name: Knipex Pliers Wrench 10"
description: Smooth parallel jaws grip like a wrench but adjust like pliers. Will not damage chrome fittings, soft metals, or finished surfaces. The tool that replaces an adjustable wrench.

name: Knipex Pliers Wrench 10" Chrome
description: Chrome-plated version of the legendary Pliers Wrench. Corrosion-resistant finish for outdoor and wet environments. Same smooth parallel jaw action.

name: Knipex High Leverage Diagonal Cutters 10"
description: High-leverage diagonal cutters with 20% easier cutting than standard cutters. Oil-hardened cutting edges for long-lasting sharpness. Cuts piano wire.
features: Cuts hard wire and piano wire

name: Knipex Needle-Nose Pliers with Cutter 8"
description: Precision needle-nose pliers with integrated cutting edges. Long narrow jaws reach into tight spaces. Cross-hatched gripping surfaces prevent slipping.

name: Knipex Combination Pliers 8"
description: Classic combination pliers with gripping jaws and integrated cutting edges. Versatile everyday pliers for gripping, bending, and cutting wire.
features: Gripping and cutting in one tool

name: Knipex Diagonal Cutters 8" (Standard Leverage)
description: Standard-leverage diagonal cutters for general wire cutting. Precision-machined cutting edges for clean, flush cuts. The everyday electrician's cutter.

name: Knipex TwinForce Diagonal Cutters 8"
description: Patented double-joint construction achieves 39x force amplification. Cuts hard wire and large cross-sections with minimal hand effort.

name: Knipex Electronic Super Knips 5"
description: Precision flush-cut electronic wire cutters for small gauge wire, fiber optics, and delicate work. Mirror-polished cutting edges for burr-free cuts.

name: Knipex 4-Piece Pliers Set (Cobra + Wrench + Cutter + Needle Nose)
description: The essential Knipex 4-piece set: 10" Cobra, 10" Pliers Wrench, 10" High Leverage Diagonal Cutters, and 8" Needle Nose. Includes foam tool tray.

name: Knipex Cobra XS Water Pump Pliers 4"
description: Ultra-compact 4-inch Cobra pliers that fit in any pocket. Same push-button adjustment as full-size. Perfect for tight spaces and everyday carry.

name: Knipex Lineman's Pliers 7.5"
description: German-engineered lineman's pliers with integrated crimper and cutter. Alternative to traditional American-style lineman's pliers.

name: Paslode CFN325XP Cordless 30-Degree Framing Nailer
description: The original cordless framing nailer. Battery and fuel cell system eliminates compressors and hoses. 15% more power than previous models, works down to 14 degrees F.

name: Paslode CF325XPRO24 Cordless Framing Nailer
description: Next-generation cordless framing nailer with extended battery life of up to 12,000 nails per charge. Upgraded motor for consistent driving power.

name: Paslode IM250A-Li2 Cordless 16-Gauge Angled Finish Nailer
description: Cordless 16-gauge angled finish nailer for trim, molding, and cabinetry. Battery and fuel cell system. Lightest in class at 4.6 lbs.

name: Paslode Cordless 16-Gauge Straight Finish Nailer
description: Cordless straight 16-gauge finish nailer for trim, baseboards, and door/window casings. Straight magazine for flat surface nailing.

name: Paslode Cordless 18-Gauge Brad Nailer
description: Cordless 18-gauge brad nailer for light trim, picture frames, and delicate molding. Leaves tiny holes that require minimal filling.

name: Paslode Cordless CSF Siding & Fencing Nailer
description: First cordless coil siding and fencing nailer. Fuel cell and battery system for complete portability. 0-degree magazine jams less than 15-degree siding nailers.

name: Bostitch Smart Point 18-Gauge Brad Nailer
description: Smart Point nose is 80% smaller than competitors for precise nail placement. Oil-free operation. The best-selling budget brad nailer for trim and finish work.

name: Bostitch SB-1664FN 16-Gauge Straight Finish Nailer
description: Lightweight 4-lb finish nailer for baseboard, crown molding, and cabinetry. Designed for smooth operation in tight quarters.

name: Bostitch F21PL2 21-Degree Framing Nailer
description: Dual-purpose framing nailer with interchangeable nosepieces for framing and metal connector applications. Magnesium body for lightweight durability.

name: Bostitch RN46-1 Coil Roofing Nailer
description: Professional coil roofing nailer for asphalt shingles, siding, insulation board, and vapor barriers. 120-nail coil magazine reduces reloads.

name: Bostitch N62FNK-2 15-Gauge Angled Finish Nailer
description: 15-gauge angled finish nailer for heavier trim work. Drives 15ga nails for stronger holding power in crown molding and stair treads.

name: Bostitch N66C-1 15-Degree Coil Siding Nailer
description: Coil siding nailer for vinyl and fiber cement siding. High-capacity 300-nail coil magazine for maximum productivity.

name: Bostitch BTFP02012 6-Gallon Pancake Air Compressor
description: Best-selling 6-gallon pancake compressor. Oil-free for no maintenance. High-efficiency motor for easy cold-weather starts. Powers all brad and finish nailers.

name: Bostitch 3-Tool Air Compressor Combo Kit
description: Complete 3-tool compressor kit with 6-gallon pancake compressor, 18ga brad nailer, 16ga finish nailer, and stapler. Everything needed for trim and finish work.

name: Bostitch SB-2IN1 Combo Brad Nailer/Finish Stapler
description: Combination brad nailer and narrow-crown finish stapler in one tool. Switch between brads and staples without changing tools.

name: Bostitch MIIIFN 16-Gauge Floor Nailer
description: Professional-grade 16-gauge pneumatic flooring nailer with soft rubber mallet. Drives L-cleats for secure hardwood floor installation. Non-marring base plate.

name: Bostitch BCN680D1 20V MAX Cordless 18-Gauge Brad Nailer
description: Cordless 18-gauge brad nailer powered by 20V MAX lithium-ion battery. No fuel cells or compressor needed. Motor-driven for consistent power.

name: Bostitch BCN662D1 20V MAX Cordless 16-Gauge Finish Nailer
description: Cordless 16-gauge finish nailer powered by 20V MAX battery. No compressor, no fuel cells. Motor-driven for consistent driving depth.

name: Klein Tools 8" Diagonal Cutting Pliers
description: Heavy-duty diagonal cutting pliers for cutting copper wire, communications cable, and soft metals. Angled head for working close to surfaces. Made in USA.

name: Klein Tools ET300 Circuit Breaker Finder
description: Quickly identifies correct circuit breaker for any outlet. Transmitter plugs into outlet, receiver scans the panel. Essential for any electrical work.

name: Paslode PowerMaster Plus 30-Degree Pneumatic Framing Nailer
description: Pneumatic 30-degree framing nailer with PowerMaster Plus motor for consistent driving power. Lightweight magnesium housing.

name: Hilti Nuron SR 30-22 Cordless Reciprocating Saw
description: Heavy-duty cordless reciprocating saw for demolition and pipe cutting. Higher stroke power than the SR 6 for demanding applications.
features: Orbital action for fast wood cuts

name: Festool CT 36 E Dust Extractor
description: Large-capacity dust extractor for heavy sanding and table saw use. Auto-clean filter for sustained suction power. Pairs with all Festool tools.

name: Dremel 8260 12V Cordless Brushless Rotary Tool with Bluetooth
description: Premium 12V cordless rotary tool with Bluetooth connectivity for speed presets and tool tracking. Brushless motor with lifetime warranty.
